title: Aussie Birds
description: This resource pack provides a new style of Aussie Birds for your pixel friends <3
body:
The following is a list providing which parrot is which :)

- The original blue parrot now the Magpie a black and white coated bird still showing it's aggression in swooping nearby players (To Clarify this is not a feature)

- The red, blue and yellow parrot is now a Crimson Rosella still showing it's blue and red   while ditching the yellow for subtle greys.

- Lime featuring more colours in the rainbow lorikeet which it's name emplies more colours all around!

- Grey representing the annoying Cockatoo now replacing it's relative the cockateil now being more cheeky around other birds and players (Again not a feature)

- Finally the Light Blue and Yellow bird now dawning a brown and light blue coat from the Laughing Kookaburra who now mocks you in a loving way... Hopefully not in a rude way :/
